% generated by Ott 0.34 from: pi.ott sigma.ott tyeq.ott epsilon.ott let.ott
\newcommand{\dddrule}[4][]{{\displaystyle\frac{\begin{array}{l}#2\end{array}}{#3}\quad\dddrulename{#4}}}
\newcommand{\ddusedrule}[1]{\[#1\]}
\newcommand{\ddpremise}[1]{ #1 \\}
\newenvironment{dddefnblock}[3][]{ \framebox{\mbox{#2}} \quad #3 \\[0pt]}{}
\newenvironment{ddfundefnblock}[3][]{ \framebox{\mbox{#2}} \quad #3 \\[0pt]\begin{displaymath}\begin{array}{l}}{\end{array}\end{displaymath}}
\newcommand{\ddfunclause}[2]{ #1 \equiv #2 \\}
\newcommand{\ddnt}[1]{\mathit{#1}}
\newcommand{\ddmv}[1]{\mathit{#1}}
\newcommand{\ddkw}[1]{\mathbf{#1}}
\newcommand{\ddsym}[1]{#1}
\newcommand{\ddcom}[1]{\text{#1}}
\newcommand{\dddrulename}[1]{\textsc{#1}}
\newcommand{\ddcomplu}[5]{\overline{#1}^{\,#2\in #3 #4 #5}}
\newcommand{\ddcompu}[3]{\overline{#1}^{\,#2<#3}}
\newcommand{\ddcomp}[2]{\overline{#1}^{\,#2}}
\newcommand{\ddgrammartabular}[1]{\begin{supertabular}{llcllllll}#1\end{supertabular}}
\newcommand{\ddmetavartabular}[1]{\begin{supertabular}{ll}#1\end{supertabular}}
\newcommand{\ddrulehead}[3]{$#1$ & & $#2$ & & & \multicolumn{2}{l}{#3}}
\newcommand{\ddprodline}[6]{& & $#1$ & $#2$ & $#3 #4$ & $#5$ & $#6$}
\newcommand{\ddfirstprodline}[6]{\ddprodline{#1}{#2}{#3}{#4}{#5}{#6}}
\newcommand{\ddlongprodline}[2]{& & $#1$ & \multicolumn{4}{l}{$#2$}}
\newcommand{\ddfirstlongprodline}[2]{\ddlongprodline{#1}{#2}}
\newcommand{\ddbindspecprodline}[6]{\ddprodline{#1}{#2}{#3}{#4}{#5}{#6}}
\newcommand{\ddprodnewline}{\\}
\newcommand{\ddinterrule}{\\[5.0mm]}
\newcommand{\ddafterlastrule}{\\}
\newcommand{\ddmetavars}{
\ddmetavartabular{
 $ \ddmv{tname} ,\, \ddmv{x} ,\, \ddmv{y} ,\, \ddmv{z} ,\, \ddmv{f} ,\, \ddmv{g} ,\, \ddmv{n} $ & \ddcom{variables} \\
 $ \ddmv{i} $ & \ddcom{indexvar} \\
}}

\newcommand{\ddv}{
\ddrulehead{\ddnt{v}}{::=}{\ddcom{values}}\ddprodnewline
\ddfirstprodline{|}{ \mathsf{Type} }{}{}{}{}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{ \lambda  \ddmv{x} .\  \ddnt{a} }{}{}{}{}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{ ( \ddmv{x} \!:\! \ddnt{A} )  \to   \ddnt{B} _ \ddmv{x} }{}{}{}{}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{\ddsym{(}  \ddnt{v}  \ddsym{)}} {\textsf{S}}{}{}{}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{ ( \ddmv{x}  :  \ddnt{A} ) \times  \ddnt{B} _ \ddmv{x} }{}{}{}{}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{\ddsym{(}  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{,}  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{)}}{}{}{}{}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{\ddnt{a}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{b}}{}{}{}{}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{\ddkw{rfl}}{}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\ddneutral}{
\ddrulehead{\ddnt{neutral}  ,\ \ddnt{ne}}{::=}{\ddcom{neutral}}\ddprodnewline
\ddfirstprodline{|}{\ddmv{x}}{}{}{}{}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{ \ddnt{ne}  \;  \ddnt{a} }{}{}{}{}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{\ddsym{(}  \ddnt{ne}  \ddsym{)}} {\textsf{S}}{}{}{}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{\ddkw{let} \, \ddsym{(}  \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{,}  \ddmv{y}  \ddsym{)}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{ne} \, \ddkw{in} \, \ddnt{a}}{}{}{}{}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{\ddnt{ne}  \triangleright  \ddnt{a}}{}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\ddnf}{
\ddrulehead{\ddnt{nf}}{::=}{\ddcom{WHNF}}\ddprodnewline
\ddfirstprodline{|}{ \mathsf{Type} }{}{}{}{}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{ \lambda  \ddmv{x} .\  \ddnt{a} }{}{}{}{}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{ ( \ddmv{x} \!:\! \ddnt{A} )  \to   \ddnt{B} _ \ddmv{x} }{}{}{}{}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{\ddmv{x}}{}{}{}{}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{ \ddnt{ne}  \;  \ddnt{b} }{}{}{}{}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{\ddsym{(}  \ddnt{nf}  \ddsym{)}} {\textsf{S}}{}{}{}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{ ( \ddmv{x}  :  \ddnt{A} ) \times  \ddnt{B} _ \ddmv{x} }{}{}{}{}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{\ddsym{(}  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{,}  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{)}}{}{}{}{}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{\ddkw{let} \, \ddsym{(}  \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{,}  \ddmv{y}  \ddsym{)}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{ne} \, \ddkw{in} \, \ddnt{a}}{}{}{}{}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{\ddnt{a}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{b}}{}{}{}{}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{\ddkw{rfl}}{}{}{}{}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{\ddnt{ne}  \triangleright  \ddnt{a}}{}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\ddep}{
\ddrulehead{\epsilon}{::=}{}\ddprodnewline
\ddfirstprodline{|}{ \mathsf{Rel} }{}{}{}{}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{ \mathsf{Irr} }{}{}{}{}}

\newcommand{\ddtm}{
\ddrulehead{\ddnt{tm}  ,\ \ddnt{a}  ,\ \ddnt{b}  ,\ \ddnt{A}  ,\ \ddnt{B}}{::=}{\ddcom{terms}}\ddprodnewline
\ddfirstprodline{|}{ \mathsf{Type} }{}{}{}{\ddcom{universe}}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{\ddmv{x}}{}{}{}{}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{ \lambda  \ddmv{x} .\  \ddnt{a} }{}{}{}{\ddcom{lambda abstraction}}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{ \ddnt{a}  \;  \ddnt{b} }{}{}{}{\ddcom{application}}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{ ( \ddmv{x} \!:\! \ddnt{A} )  \to   \ddnt{B} _ \ddmv{x} }{}{}{}{\ddcom{$\Pi$/product}}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{\ddnt{a}  \ddsym{[}  \ddmv{x}  \mapsto  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{]}} {\textsf{S}}{}{}{\ddcom{subst}}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{\ddsym{(}  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{A}  \ddsym{)}}{}{}{}{\ddcom{ascription}}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{\ddsym{(}  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{)}} {\textsf{S}}{}{}{\ddcom{paren}}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{\ddkw{sorry}}{}{}{}{\ddcom{stub}}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{\ddkw{show}}{}{}{}{\ddcom{show ctx}}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{ ( \ddmv{x}  :  \ddnt{A} ) \times  \ddnt{B} _ \ddmv{x} }{}{}{}{\ddcom{$\Sigma$/coproduct}}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{\ddsym{(}  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{,}  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{)}}{}{}{}{\ddcom{products}}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{\ddkw{let} \, \ddsym{(}  \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{,}  \ddmv{y}  \ddsym{)}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a} \, \ddkw{in} \, \ddnt{b}}{}{}{}{\ddcom{pair elim}}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{\ddnt{a}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{b}}{}{}{}{\ddcom{Eq}}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{\ddkw{rfl}}{}{}{}{\ddcom{reflexivity}}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{\ddnt{b}  \triangleright  \ddnt{a}}{}{}{}{\ddcom{cast}}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{\ddkw{exfalso} \, \ddnt{a}}{}{}{}{\ddcom{ex falso}}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{ \lambda \{ \ddmv{x} \} .\  \ddnt{a} }{}{}{}{\ddcom{irr lambda}}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{ \ddnt{a} \ \{ \ddnt{b} \} }{}{}{}{\ddcom{irr app}}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{ \{ \ddmv{x} \!:\! \ddnt{A} \} \rightarrow  \ddnt{B} _ \ddmv{x} }{}{}{}{\ddcom{irr $Pi$}}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{\ddkw{let} \, \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a} \, \ddkw{in} \, \ddnt{b}}{}{}{}{\ddcom{let}}}

\newcommand{\ddcontext}{
\ddrulehead{\ddnt{context}  ,\ \Gamma}{::=}{\ddcom{contexts}}\ddprodnewline
\ddfirstprodline{|}{ \varnothing }{}{}{}{\ddcom{empty}}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{ \Gamma ,  \ddmv{x} \! :\! \ddnt{A} }{}{}{}{\ddcom{cons}}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{ \ddmv{x} \! :\! \ddnt{A} }{}{}{}{\ddcom{singleton}}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{\ddsym{(}  \Gamma  \ddsym{)}} {\textsf{S}}{}{}{}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{ \Gamma ,  \ddmv{x} \! :^ \epsilon \! \ddnt{A} }{}{}{}{\ddcom{irr cons}}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{ \ddmv{x} \! :^ \epsilon \!  \ddnt{A} }{}{}{}{\ddcom{irr single}}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{ \Gamma ^ \epsilon }{}{}{}{\ddcom{demote}}\ddprodnewline
\ddprodline{|}{\Gamma  \ddsym{,}  \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a}}{}{}{}{\ddcom{cons eq hypo}}}

\newcommand{\ddgrammar}{\ddgrammartabular{
\ddv\ddinterrule
\ddneutral\ddinterrule
\ddnf\ddinterrule
\ddep\ddinterrule
\ddtm\ddinterrule
\ddcontext\ddafterlastrule
}}

% defnss
% defns JImpleq
%% defn impleq
\newcommand{\dddruleimpleqXXrefl}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \xlongequal{\mathsf{impl} }  \ddnt{a}}{%
{\dddrulename{impleq\_refl}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleimpleqXXWHNFXXext}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddnt{a}  \leadsto  \ddnt{nf_{{\mathrm{1}}}} }%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddnt{b}  \leadsto  \ddnt{nf_{{\mathrm{2}}}} }%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{nf_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \xlongequal{\mathsf{impl} }  \ddnt{nf_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \xlongequal{\mathsf{impl} }  \ddnt{b}}{%
{\dddrulename{impleq\_WHNF\_ext}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleimpleqXXlamXXcongr}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \xlongequal{\mathsf{impl} }  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   \lambda  \ddmv{x} .\  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}   \xlongequal{\mathsf{impl} }   \lambda  \ddmv{x} .\  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{2}}}} }{%
{\dddrulename{impleq\_lam\_congr}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleimpleqXXpiXXcongr}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \xlongequal{\mathsf{impl} }  \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{B_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \xlongequal{\mathsf{impl} }  \ddnt{B_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   ( \ddmv{x} \!:\! \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}} )  \to   \ddnt{B_{{\mathrm{1}}}} _ \ddmv{x}   \xlongequal{\mathsf{impl} }   ( \ddmv{x} \!:\! \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{2}}}} )  \to   \ddnt{B_{{\mathrm{2}}}} _ \ddmv{x} }{%
{\dddrulename{impleq\_pi\_congr}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleimpleqXXappXXcongr}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{ne_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \xlongequal{\mathsf{impl} }  \ddnt{ne_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{b_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \xlongequal{\mathsf{impl} }  \ddnt{b_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   \ddnt{ne_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \;  \ddnt{b_{{\mathrm{1}}}}   \xlongequal{\mathsf{impl} }   \ddnt{ne_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \;  \ddnt{b_{{\mathrm{2}}}} }{%
{\dddrulename{impleq\_app\_congr}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\dddefnimpleq}[1]{\begin{dddefnblock}[#1]{$\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \xlongequal{\mathsf{impl} }  \ddnt{b}$}{}
 metatheoric equality \ddusedrule{\dddruleimpleqXXrefl{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleimpleqXXWHNFXXext{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleimpleqXXlamXXcongr{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleimpleqXXpiXXcongr{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleimpleqXXappXXcongr{}}
\end{dddefnblock}}


\newcommand{\dddefnsJImpleq}{
\dddefnimpleq{}}

% defns JWHNF
%% defn WHNF
\newcommand{\dddruleWHNFXXlamXXbeta}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddnt{a}  \leadsto  \ddsym{(}   \lambda  \ddmv{x} .\  \ddnt{a'}   \ddsym{)} }%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddsym{(}  \ddnt{a'}  \ddsym{[}  \ddmv{x}  \mapsto  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{]}  \ddsym{)}  \leadsto  \ddnt{nf} }%
}{
 \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \   \ddnt{a}  \;  \ddnt{b}   \leadsto  \ddnt{nf} }{%
{\dddrulename{WHNF\_lam\_beta}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleWHNFXXtype}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
}{
 \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \   \mathsf{Type}   \leadsto   \mathsf{Type}  }{%
{\dddrulename{WHNF\_type}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleWHNFXXlam}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
}{
 \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \   \lambda  \ddmv{x} .\  \ddnt{a}   \leadsto   \lambda  \ddmv{x} .\  \ddnt{a}  }{%
{\dddrulename{WHNF\_lam}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleWHNFXXpi}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
}{
 \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \   ( \ddmv{x} \!:\! \ddnt{A} )  \to   \ddnt{B} _ \ddmv{x}   \leadsto   ( \ddmv{x} \!:\! \ddnt{A} )  \to   \ddnt{B} _ \ddmv{x}  }{%
{\dddrulename{WHNF\_pi}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleWHNFXXvar}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\ddmv{x}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a} \, \in \, \Gamma}%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddnt{a}  \leadsto  \ddnt{nf} }%
}{
 \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddmv{x}  \leadsto  \ddnt{nf} }{%
{\dddrulename{WHNF\_var}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleWHNFXXapp}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddnt{a}  \leadsto  \ddnt{ne} }%
}{
 \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \   \ddnt{a}  \;  \ddnt{b}   \leadsto   \ddnt{ne}  \;  \ddnt{b}  }{%
{\dddrulename{WHNF\_app}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleWHNFXXannot}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddnt{a}  \leadsto  \ddnt{nf} }%
}{
 \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddsym{(}  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{A}  \ddsym{)}  \leadsto  \ddnt{nf} }{%
{\dddrulename{WHNF\_annot}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleWHNFXXletpair}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddnt{a}  \leadsto  \ddsym{(}  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{,}  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \ddsym{)} }%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddsym{(}  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{[}  \ddmv{x}  \mapsto  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{]}  \ddsym{[}  \ddmv{y}  \mapsto  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \ddsym{]}  \ddsym{)}  \leadsto  \ddnt{nf} }%
}{
 \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddkw{let} \, \ddsym{(}  \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{,}  \ddmv{y}  \ddsym{)}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a} \, \ddkw{in} \, \ddnt{b}  \leadsto  \ddnt{nf} }{%
{\dddrulename{WHNF\_letpair}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleWHNFXXprodXXcongr}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddnt{a}  \leadsto  \ddnt{ne} }%
}{
 \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddkw{let} \, \ddsym{(}  \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{,}  \ddmv{y}  \ddsym{)}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a} \, \ddkw{in} \, \ddnt{b}  \leadsto  \ddkw{let} \, \ddsym{(}  \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{,}  \ddmv{y}  \ddsym{)}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{ne} \, \ddkw{in} \, \ddnt{b} }{%
{\dddrulename{WHNF\_prod\_congr}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleWHNFXXtypaleqXXrefl}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
}{
 \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddsym{(}  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{)}  \leadsto  \ddsym{(}  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{)} }{%
{\dddrulename{WHNF\_typaleq\_refl}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleWHNFXXrefl}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
}{
 \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddkw{rfl}  \leadsto  \ddkw{rfl} }{%
{\dddrulename{WHNF\_refl}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleWHNFXXtypalsubst}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddnt{b}  \leadsto  rf }%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddnt{a}  \leadsto  \ddnt{nf} }%
}{
 \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddsym{(}  \ddnt{b}  \triangleright  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{)}  \leadsto  \ddnt{nf} }{%
{\dddrulename{WHNF\_typalsubst}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleWHNFXXtypalsubstXXcongr}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddnt{b}  \leadsto  \ddnt{ne} }%
}{
 \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddsym{(}  \ddnt{ne}  \triangleright  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{)}  \leadsto  \ddsym{(}  \ddnt{ne}  \triangleright  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{)} }{%
{\dddrulename{WHNF\_typalsubst\_congr}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleWHNFXXdef}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\ddmv{x}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a} \, \in \, \Gamma}%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddnt{a}  \leadsto  \ddnt{v} }%
}{
 \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddmv{x}  \leadsto  \ddnt{v} }{%
{\dddrulename{WHNF\_def}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleWHNFXXletXXbeta}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddsym{(}  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{[}  \ddmv{x}  \mapsto  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{]}  \ddsym{)}  \leadsto  \ddnt{v} }%
}{
 \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddsym{(}  \ddkw{let} \, \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a} \, \ddkw{in} \, \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{)}  \leadsto  \ddnt{v} }{%
{\dddrulename{WHNF\_let\_beta}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\dddefnWHNF}[1]{\begin{dddefnblock}[#1]{$ \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddnt{a}  \leadsto  \ddnt{nf} $}{\ddcom{WHNF normalization}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleWHNFXXlamXXbeta{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleWHNFXXtype{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleWHNFXXlam{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleWHNFXXpi{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleWHNFXXvar{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleWHNFXXapp{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleWHNFXXannot{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleWHNFXXletpair{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleWHNFXXprodXXcongr{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleWHNFXXtypaleqXXrefl{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleWHNFXXrefl{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleWHNFXXtypalsubst{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleWHNFXXtypalsubstXXcongr{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleWHNFXXdef{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleWHNFXXletXXbeta{}}
\end{dddefnblock}}


\newcommand{\dddefnsJWHNF}{
\dddefnWHNF{}}

% defns JEq
%% defn eq
\newcommand{\dddruleeXXbeta}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   \ddsym{(}   \lambda  \ddmv{x} .\  \ddnt{a}   \ddsym{)}  \;  \ddnt{b}   \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{[}  \ddmv{x}  \mapsto  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{]}}{%
{\dddrulename{e\_beta}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleeXXrefl}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{A}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{A}}{%
{\dddrulename{e\_refl}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleeXXsym}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{A}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{B}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{B}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{A}}{%
{\dddrulename{e\_sym}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleeXXtrans}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{3}}}}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{3}}}}}{%
{\dddrulename{e\_trans}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleeXXsubstXXcongr}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{[}  \ddmv{x}  \mapsto  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{]}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{[}  \ddmv{x}  \mapsto  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \ddsym{]}}{%
{\dddrulename{e\_subst\_congr}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleeXXpiXXcongr}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma ,  \ddmv{x} \! :\! \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}   \vdash  \ddnt{B_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{B_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   ( \ddmv{x} \!:\! \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}} )  \to   \ddnt{B_{{\mathrm{1}}}} _ \ddmv{x}   \ddsym{=}   ( \ddmv{x} \!:\! \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{2}}}} )  \to   \ddnt{B_{{\mathrm{2}}}} _ \ddmv{x} }{%
{\dddrulename{e\_pi\_congr}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleeXXlamXXcongr}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma ,  \ddmv{x} \! :\! \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}   \vdash  \ddnt{b_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{b_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   \lambda  \ddmv{x} .\  \ddnt{b_{{\mathrm{1}}}}   \ddsym{=}   \lambda  \ddmv{x} .\  \ddnt{b_{{\mathrm{2}}}} }{%
{\dddrulename{e\_lam\_congr}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleeXXappXXcongr}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{b_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{b_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \;  \ddnt{b_{{\mathrm{1}}}}   \ddsym{=}   \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \;  \ddnt{b_{{\mathrm{2}}}} }{%
{\dddrulename{e\_app\_congr}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleeXXascribe}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddsym{(}  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{A}  \ddsym{)}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}{%
{\dddrulename{e\_ascribe}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleeXXpairXXelim}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddkw{let} \, \ddsym{(}  \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{,}  \ddmv{y}  \ddsym{)}  \ddsym{=}  \ddsym{(}  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{,}  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \ddsym{)} \, \ddkw{in} \, \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{[}  \ddmv{x}  \mapsto  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{]}  \ddsym{[}  \ddmv{y}  \mapsto  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \ddsym{]}}{%
{\dddrulename{e\_pair\_elim}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleeXXsigmaXXcongr}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma ,  \ddmv{x} \! :\! \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}   \vdash  \ddnt{B_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{B_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   ( \ddmv{x}  :  \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}} ) \times  \ddnt{B_{{\mathrm{1}}}} _ \ddmv{x}   \ddsym{=}   ( \ddmv{x}  :  \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{2}}}} ) \times  \ddnt{B_{{\mathrm{2}}}} _ \ddmv{x} }{%
{\dddrulename{e\_sigma\_congr}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleeXXprod}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{b_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{b'_{{\mathrm{1}}}}}%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{b_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{b'_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddsym{(}  \ddnt{b_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{,}  \ddnt{b_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \ddsym{)}  \ddsym{=}  \ddsym{(}  \ddnt{b'_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{,}  \ddnt{b'_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \ddsym{)}}{%
{\dddrulename{e\_prod}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleeXXpairXXcongr}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a'}}%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{b'}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddkw{let} \, \ddsym{(}  \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{,}  \ddmv{y}  \ddsym{)}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a} \, \ddkw{in} \, \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{=}  \ddkw{let} \, \ddsym{(}  \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{,}  \ddmv{y}  \ddsym{)}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a'} \, \ddkw{in} \, \ddnt{b'}}{%
{\dddrulename{e\_pair\_congr}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleeXXtypalsubstXXbeta}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddkw{rfl}  \triangleright  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a}}{%
{\dddrulename{e\_typalsubst\_beta}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleeXXtypalsubstXXcongr}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a'}}%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{b'}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{b}  \triangleright  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{b'}  \triangleright  \ddnt{a'}}{%
{\dddrulename{e\_typalsubst\_congr}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleeXXtypaleqXXcongr}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{b_{{\mathrm{1}}}}}%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{b_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddsym{(}  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \ddsym{)}  \ddsym{=}  \ddsym{(}  \ddnt{b_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{b_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \ddsym{)}}{%
{\dddrulename{e\_typaleq\_congr}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleeXXexfalsoXXcongr}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a'}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddkw{exfalso} \, \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{=}  \ddkw{exfalso} \, \ddnt{a'}}{%
{\dddrulename{e\_exfalso\_congr}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleeXXeappXXcongr}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}} \ \{ \ddnt{b_{{\mathrm{1}}}} \}   \ddsym{=}   \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{2}}}} \ \{ \ddnt{b_{{\mathrm{2}}}} \} }{%
{\dddrulename{e\_eapp\_congr}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleeXXelamXXcongr}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma ,  \ddmv{x} \! :^  \mathsf{Irr}  \! \ddnt{A}   \vdash  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   \lambda \{ \ddmv{x} \} .\  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}   \ddsym{=}   \lambda \{ \ddmv{x} \} .\  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{2}}}} }{%
{\dddrulename{e\_elam\_congr}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleeXXepiXXcongr}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma ,  \ddmv{x} \! :^  \mathsf{Rel}  \! \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}   \vdash  \ddnt{B_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{B_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   \{ \ddmv{x} \!:\! \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}} \} \rightarrow  \ddnt{B_{{\mathrm{1}}}} _ \ddmv{x}   \ddsym{=}   \{ \ddmv{x} \!:\! \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{2}}}} \} \rightarrow  \ddnt{B_{{\mathrm{2}}}} _ \ddmv{x} }{%
{\dddrulename{e\_epi\_congr}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleeXXvar}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\ddmv{x}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a} \, \in \, \Gamma}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a}}{%
{\dddrulename{e\_var}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleeXXletXXbeta}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddkw{let} \, \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a} \, \ddkw{in} \, \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{[}  \ddmv{x}  \mapsto  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{]}}{%
{\dddrulename{e\_let\_beta}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleeXXlet}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma ,  \ddmv{x} \! :\! \ddnt{A}   \ddsym{,}  \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \vdash  \ddnt{b_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{b_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddkw{let} \, \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}} \, \ddkw{in} \, \ddnt{b_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{=}  \ddkw{let} \, \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{2}}}} \, \ddkw{in} \, \ddnt{b_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}{%
{\dddrulename{e\_let}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\dddefneq}[1]{\begin{dddefnblock}[#1]{$\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{A}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{B}$}{\ddcom{Definitional/Judgmental equality}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleeXXbeta{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleeXXrefl{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleeXXsym{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleeXXtrans{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleeXXsubstXXcongr{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleeXXpiXXcongr{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleeXXlamXXcongr{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleeXXappXXcongr{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleeXXascribe{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleeXXpairXXelim{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleeXXsigmaXXcongr{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleeXXprod{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleeXXpairXXcongr{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleeXXtypalsubstXXbeta{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleeXXtypalsubstXXcongr{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleeXXtypaleqXXcongr{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleeXXexfalsoXXcongr{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleeXXeappXXcongr{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleeXXelamXXcongr{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleeXXepiXXcongr{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleeXXvar{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleeXXletXXbeta{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleeXXlet{}}
\end{dddefnblock}}


\newcommand{\dddefnsJEq}{
\dddefneq{}}

% defns JTyping
%% defn typing
\newcommand{\dddruletXXvar}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\ddmv{x}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{A} \, \in \, \Gamma}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{A}}{%
{\dddrulename{t\_var}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruletXXslambda}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma ,  \ddmv{x} \! :\! \ddnt{A}   \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{B}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   \lambda  \ddmv{x} .\  \ddnt{a}   \ddsym{:}   ( \ddmv{x} \!:\! \ddnt{A} )  \to   \ddnt{B} _ \ddmv{x} }{%
{\dddrulename{t\_slambda}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruletXXsslambda}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma ,  \ddmv{x} \! :\! \ddnt{A}   \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{B}}%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{A}  \ddsym{:}   \mathsf{Type} }%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   \lambda  \ddmv{x} .\  \ddnt{a}   \ddsym{:}   ( \ddmv{x} \!:\! \ddnt{A} )  \to   \ddnt{B} _ \ddmv{x} }{%
{\dddrulename{t\_sslambda}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruletXXlambda}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma ,  \ddmv{x} \! :\! \ddnt{A}   \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{B}  \ddsym{[}  \ddmv{x'}  \mapsto  \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{]}}%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{A}  \ddsym{:}   \mathsf{Type} }%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   \lambda  \ddmv{x} .\  \ddnt{a}   \ddsym{:}   ( \ddmv{x'} \!:\! \ddnt{A} )  \to   \ddnt{B} _ \ddmv{x'} }{%
{\dddrulename{t\_lambda}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruletXXpi}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{A}  \ddsym{:}   \mathsf{Type} }%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma ,  \ddmv{x} \! :\! \ddnt{A}   \vdash  \ddnt{B}  \ddsym{:}   \mathsf{Type} }%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   ( \ddmv{x} \!:\! \ddnt{A} )  \to   \ddnt{B} _ \ddmv{x}   \ddsym{:}   \mathsf{Type} }{%
{\dddrulename{t\_pi}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruletXXimpredXXuniv}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   \mathsf{Type}   \ddsym{:}   \mathsf{Type} }{%
{\dddrulename{t\_impred\_univ}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruletXXapp}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{:}   ( \ddmv{x} \!:\! \ddnt{A} )  \to   \ddnt{B} _ \ddmv{x} }%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{A}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   \ddnt{a}  \;  \ddnt{b}   \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{B}  \ddsym{[}  \ddmv{x}  \mapsto  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{]}}{%
{\dddrulename{t\_app}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruletXXcast}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{A}}%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{A}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{B}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{B}}{%
{\dddrulename{t\_cast}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruletXXsigma}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{A}  \ddsym{:}   \mathsf{Type} }%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma ,  \ddmv{x} \! :\! \ddnt{A}   \vdash  \ddnt{B}  \ddsym{:}   \mathsf{Type} }%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   ( \ddmv{x}  :  \ddnt{A} ) \times  \ddnt{B} _ \ddmv{x}   \ddsym{:}   \mathsf{Type} }{%
{\dddrulename{t\_sigma}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruletXXpair}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{A}}%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{B}  \ddsym{[}  \ddmv{x}  \mapsto  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{]}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddsym{(}  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{,}  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{)}  \ddsym{:}   ( \ddmv{x}  :  \ddnt{A} ) \times  \ddnt{B} _ \ddmv{x} }{%
{\dddrulename{t\_pair}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruletXXletpair}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{:}   ( \ddmv{x}  :  \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}} ) \times  \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{2}}}} _ \ddmv{x} }%
\ddpremise{  \Gamma ,  \ddmv{x} \! :\! \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  ,  \ddmv{y} \! :\! \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{2}}}}   \vdash  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{B}}%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{B}  \ddsym{:}   \mathsf{Type} }%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddkw{let} \, \ddsym{(}  \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{,}  \ddmv{y}  \ddsym{)}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a} \, \ddkw{in} \, \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{B}}{%
{\dddrulename{t\_letpair}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruletXXeq}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{A}}%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{A}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{:}   \mathsf{Type} }{%
{\dddrulename{t\_eq}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruletXXrefl}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{b}}%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{:}   \mathsf{Type} }%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddkw{rfl}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{b}}{%
{\dddrulename{t\_refl}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruletXXreflXXsimple}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{A}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddkw{rfl}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a}}{%
{\dddrulename{t\_refl\_simple}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruletXXsubstXXsimple}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{A}  \ddsym{[}  \ddmv{x}  \mapsto  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{]}}%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{A}  \ddsym{[}  \ddmv{x}  \mapsto  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \ddsym{]}  \triangleright  \ddnt{a}}{%
{\dddrulename{t\_subst\_simple}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruletXXsubst}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{A}  \ddsym{[}  \ddmv{x}  \mapsto  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{]}  \ddsym{[}  \ddmv{y}  \mapsto  \ddkw{rfl}  \ddsym{]}}%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{2}}}}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{A}  \ddsym{[}  \ddmv{x}  \mapsto  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \ddsym{]}  \ddsym{[}  \ddmv{y}  \mapsto  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{]}  \triangleright  \ddnt{a}}{%
{\dddrulename{t\_subst}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruletXXexfalso}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{A}  \ddsym{:}   \mathsf{Type} }%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{:}  True  \ddsym{=}  False}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddkw{exfalso} \, \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{A}}{%
{\dddrulename{t\_exfalso}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruletXXevar}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{ \ddmv{x} :^  \mathsf{Rel}  \ddnt{A}   \in   \Gamma }%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{A}}{%
{\dddrulename{t\_evar}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruletXXelambda}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma ,  \ddmv{x} \! :^  \mathsf{Irr}  \! \ddnt{A}   \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{B}}%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma ^  \mathsf{Rel}    \vdash  \ddnt{A}  \ddsym{:}   \mathsf{Type} }%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   \lambda \{ \ddmv{x} \} .\  \ddnt{a}   \ddsym{:}   \{ \ddmv{x} \!:\! \ddnt{A} \} \rightarrow  \ddnt{B} _ \ddmv{x} }{%
{\dddrulename{t\_elambda}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruletXXeapp}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{:}   \{ \ddmv{x} \!:\! \ddnt{A} \} \rightarrow  \ddnt{B} _ \ddmv{x} }%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma ^  \mathsf{Rel}    \vdash  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{A}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   \ddnt{a} \ \{ \ddnt{b} \}   \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{B}  \ddsym{[}  \ddmv{x}  \mapsto  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{]}}{%
{\dddrulename{t\_eapp}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruletXXepi}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{A}  \ddsym{:}   \mathsf{Type} }%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma ,  \ddmv{x} \! :^  \mathsf{Rel}  \! \ddnt{A}   \vdash  \ddnt{B}  \ddsym{:}   \mathsf{Type} }%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   \{ \ddmv{x} \!:\! \ddnt{A} \} \rightarrow  \ddnt{B} _ \ddmv{x}   \ddsym{:}   \mathsf{Type} }{%
{\dddrulename{t\_epi}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruletXXletXXsimple}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{A}}%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma ,  \ddmv{x} \! :\! \ddnt{A}   \vdash  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{B}}%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{B}  \ddsym{:}   \mathsf{Type} }%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddkw{let} \, \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a} \, \ddkw{in} \, \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{B}}{%
{\dddrulename{t\_let\_simple}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruletXXlet}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{A}}%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma ,  \ddmv{x} \! :\! \ddnt{A}   \ddsym{,}  \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a}  \vdash  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{B}}%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{B}  \ddsym{:}   \mathsf{Type} }%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddkw{let} \, \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a} \, \ddkw{in} \, \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{B}}{%
{\dddrulename{t\_let}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\dddefntyping}[1]{\begin{dddefnblock}[#1]{$\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{A}$}{\ddcom{Typing}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruletXXvar{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruletXXslambda{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruletXXsslambda{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruletXXlambda{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruletXXpi{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruletXXimpredXXuniv{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruletXXapp{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruletXXcast{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruletXXsigma{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruletXXpair{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruletXXletpair{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruletXXeq{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruletXXrefl{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruletXXreflXXsimple{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruletXXsubstXXsimple{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruletXXsubst{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruletXXexfalso{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruletXXevar{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruletXXelambda{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruletXXeapp{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruletXXepi{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruletXXletXXsimple{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruletXXlet{}}
\end{dddefnblock}}


\newcommand{\dddefnsJTyping}{
\dddefntyping{}}

% defns JBidirectional
%% defn checkCtx
\newcommand{\dddrulegXXnil}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
}{
\vdash   \varnothing }{%
{\dddrulename{g\_nil}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddrulegXXcons}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{A}  \ddsym{:}   \mathsf{Type} }%
\ddpremise{\vdash  \Gamma}%
}{
\vdash   \Gamma ,  \ddmv{x} \! :\! \ddnt{A} }{%
{\dddrulename{g\_cons}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\dddefncheckCtx}[1]{\begin{dddefnblock}[#1]{$\vdash  \Gamma$}{\ddcom{Context ctors}}
\ddusedrule{\dddrulegXXnil{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddrulegXXcons{}}
\end{dddefnblock}}

%% defn inferType
\newcommand{\dddruleiXXvar}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\ddmv{x}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{A} \, \in \, \Gamma}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddmv{x}  \Rightarrow  \ddnt{A}}{%
{\dddrulename{i\_var}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleiXXappXXnonwhnf}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \Rightarrow   ( \ddmv{x} \!:\! \ddnt{A} )  \to   \ddnt{B} _ \ddmv{x} }%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{b}  \Leftarrow  \ddnt{A}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   \ddnt{a}  \;  \ddnt{b}   \Rightarrow  \ddnt{B}  \ddsym{[}  \ddmv{x}  \mapsto  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{]}}{%
{\dddrulename{i\_app\_nonwhnf}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleiXXapp}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \Rightarrow  \ddnt{A}}%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddnt{A}  \leadsto   ( \ddmv{x} \!:\! \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}} )  \to   \ddnt{B} _ \ddmv{x}  }%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{b}  \Leftarrow  \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   \ddnt{a}  \;  \ddnt{b}   \Rightarrow  \ddnt{B}  \ddsym{[}  \ddmv{x}  \mapsto  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{]}}{%
{\dddrulename{i\_app}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleiXXpi}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{A}  \Leftarrow   \mathsf{Type} }%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma ,  \ddmv{x} \! :\! \ddnt{A}   \vdash  \ddnt{B}  \Leftarrow   \mathsf{Type} }%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   ( \ddmv{x} \!:\! \ddnt{A} )  \to   \ddnt{B} _ \ddmv{x}   \Rightarrow   \mathsf{Type} }{%
{\dddrulename{i\_pi}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleiXXimpredXXuniv}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   \mathsf{Type}   \Rightarrow   \mathsf{Type} }{%
{\dddrulename{i\_impred\_univ}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleiXXascribe}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{A}  \Leftarrow   \mathsf{Type} }%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \Leftarrow  \ddnt{A}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddsym{(}  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{:}  \ddnt{A}  \ddsym{)}  \Rightarrow  \ddnt{A}}{%
{\dddrulename{i\_ascribe}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleiXXsigma}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{A}  \Leftarrow   \mathsf{Type} }%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma ,  \ddmv{x} \! :\! \ddnt{A}   \vdash  \ddnt{B}  \Leftarrow   \mathsf{Type} }%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   ( \ddmv{x}  :  \ddnt{A} ) \times  \ddnt{B} _ \ddmv{x}   \Rightarrow   \mathsf{Type} }{%
{\dddrulename{i\_sigma}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleiXXeq}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \Rightarrow  \ddnt{A}}%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{b}  \Rightarrow  \ddnt{B}}%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{A}  \xlongequal{\mathsf{impl} }  \ddnt{B}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddsym{(}  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{)}  \Rightarrow   \mathsf{Type} }{%
{\dddrulename{i\_eq}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleiXXsubst}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{b}  \Rightarrow  \ddnt{B}}%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddnt{B}  \leadsto  \ddsym{(}  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \ddsym{)} }%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \Rightarrow  \ddnt{A}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{b}  \Rightarrow  \ddnt{A}  \triangleright  \ddnt{a}}{%
{\dddrulename{i\_subst}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleiXXletXXsimple}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \Rightarrow  \ddnt{A}}%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma ,  \ddmv{x} \! :\! \ddnt{A}   \vdash  \ddnt{b}  \Rightarrow  \ddnt{B}}%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{B}  \Leftarrow   \mathsf{Type} }%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddkw{let} \, \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a} \, \ddkw{in} \, \ddnt{b}  \Rightarrow  \ddnt{B}}{%
{\dddrulename{i\_let\_simple}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddruleiXXlet}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \Rightarrow  \ddnt{A}}%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma ,  \ddmv{x} \! :\! \ddnt{A}   \ddsym{,}  \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a}  \vdash  \ddnt{b}  \Rightarrow  \ddnt{B}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddkw{let} \, \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a} \, \ddkw{in} \, \ddnt{b}  \Rightarrow  \ddnt{B}  \ddsym{[}  \ddmv{x}  \mapsto  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{]}}{%
{\dddrulename{i\_let}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\dddefninferType}[1]{\begin{dddefnblock}[#1]{$\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \Rightarrow  \ddnt{A}$}{\ddcom{type synthesis}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleiXXvar{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleiXXappXXnonwhnf{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleiXXapp{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleiXXpi{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleiXXimpredXXuniv{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleiXXascribe{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleiXXsigma{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleiXXeq{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleiXXsubst{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleiXXletXXsimple{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddruleiXXlet{}}
\end{dddefnblock}}

%% defn checkType
\newcommand{\dddrulecXXlambda}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma ,  \ddmv{x} \! :\! \ddnt{A}   \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \Leftarrow  \ddnt{B}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash   \lambda  \ddmv{x} .\  \ddnt{a}   \Leftarrow   ( \ddmv{x} \!:\! \ddnt{A} )  \to   \ddnt{B} _ \ddmv{x} }{%
{\dddrulename{c\_lambda}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddrulecXXinferXXsimple}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{ \ddnt{a} \ \text{not applicable} }%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \Rightarrow  \ddnt{A}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \Leftarrow  \ddnt{A}}{%
{\dddrulename{c\_infer\_simple}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddrulecXXswitchXXmode}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{ \ddnt{a} \ \text{not applicable} }%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \Rightarrow  \ddnt{A}}%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{A}  \xlongequal{\mathsf{impl} }  \ddnt{B}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \Leftarrow  \ddnt{B}}{%
{\dddrulename{c\_switch\_mode}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddrulecXXWHNF}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{ \ddnt{A}  \notin \mathbf{WHNF} }%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \Leftarrow  \ddnt{nf}}%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddnt{A}  \leadsto  \ddnt{nf} }%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \Leftarrow  \ddnt{A}}{%
{\dddrulename{c\_WHNF}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddrulecXXpair}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \Leftarrow  \ddnt{A}}%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{b}  \Leftarrow  \ddnt{B}  \ddsym{[}  \ddmv{x}  \mapsto  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{]}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddsym{(}  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{,}  \ddnt{b}  \ddsym{)}  \Leftarrow   ( \ddmv{x}  :  \ddnt{A} ) \times  \ddnt{B} _ \ddmv{x} }{%
{\dddrulename{c\_pair}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddrulecXXletpairXXsimple}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \Rightarrow   ( \ddmv{x}  :  \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}} ) \times  \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{2}}}} _ \ddmv{x} }%
\ddpremise{  \Gamma ,  \ddmv{x} \! :\! \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  ,  \ddmv{y} \! :\! \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{2}}}}   \vdash  \ddnt{b}  \Leftarrow  \ddnt{B}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddkw{let} \, \ddsym{(}  \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{,}  \ddmv{y}  \ddsym{)}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a} \, \ddkw{in} \, \ddnt{b}  \Leftarrow  \ddnt{B}}{%
{\dddrulename{c\_letpair\_simple}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddrulecXXletpairXXRL}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddmv{z}  \Rightarrow   ( \ddmv{x}  :  \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}} ) \times  \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{2}}}} _ \ddmv{x} }%
\ddpremise{  \Gamma ,  \ddmv{x} \! :\! \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  ,  \ddmv{y} \! :\! \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{2}}}}   \vdash  \ddnt{b}  \Leftarrow  \ddnt{B}  \ddsym{[}  \ddmv{z}  \mapsto  \ddsym{(}  \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{,}  \ddmv{y}  \ddsym{)}  \ddsym{]}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddkw{let} \, \ddsym{(}  \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{,}  \ddmv{y}  \ddsym{)}  \ddsym{=}  \ddmv{z} \, \ddkw{in} \, \ddnt{b}  \Leftarrow  \ddnt{B}}{%
{\dddrulename{c\_letpair\_RL}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddrulecXXrefl}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \xlongequal{\mathsf{impl} }  \ddnt{b}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddkw{rfl}  \Leftarrow  \ddnt{a}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{b}}{%
{\dddrulename{c\_refl}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddrulecXXsubstXXleftXXsimple}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{b}  \Rightarrow  \ddnt{B}}%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddnt{B}  \leadsto  \ddsym{(}  \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \ddsym{)} }%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \Leftarrow  \ddnt{A}  \ddsym{[}  \ddmv{x}  \mapsto  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \ddsym{]}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{b}  \Leftarrow  \ddnt{A}  \triangleright  \ddnt{a}}{%
{\dddrulename{c\_subst\_left\_simple}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddrulecXXsubstXXrightXXsimple}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{b}  \Rightarrow  \ddnt{B}}%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddnt{B}  \leadsto  \ddsym{(}  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{=}  \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{)} }%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \Leftarrow  \ddnt{A}  \ddsym{[}  \ddmv{x}  \mapsto  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{]}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{b}  \Leftarrow  \ddnt{A}  \triangleright  \ddnt{a}}{%
{\dddrulename{c\_subst\_right\_simple}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddrulecXXsubstXXl}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddmv{y}  \Rightarrow  \ddnt{B}}%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddnt{B}  \leadsto  \ddsym{(}  \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \ddsym{)} }%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \Leftarrow  \ddnt{A}  \ddsym{[}  \ddmv{x}  \mapsto  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \ddsym{]}  \ddsym{[}  \ddmv{y}  \mapsto  \ddkw{rfl}  \ddsym{]}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddmv{y}  \Leftarrow  \ddnt{A}  \triangleright  \ddnt{a}}{%
{\dddrulename{c\_subst\_l}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddrulecXXsubstXXr}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddmv{y}  \Rightarrow  \ddnt{B}}%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddnt{B}  \leadsto  \ddsym{(}  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{=}  \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{)} }%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \Leftarrow  \ddnt{A}  \ddsym{[}  \ddmv{x}  \mapsto  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{]}  \ddsym{[}  \ddmv{y}  \mapsto  \ddkw{rfl}  \ddsym{]}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddmv{y}  \Leftarrow  \ddnt{A}  \triangleright  \ddnt{a}}{%
{\dddrulename{c\_subst\_r}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddrulecXXexfalso}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \Rightarrow  \ddnt{A}}%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddnt{A}  \leadsto  \ddsym{(}  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \ddsym{)} }%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  \leadsto  True }%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma   \vdash   \ddkw{WHNF} \  \ddnt{a_{{\mathrm{2}}}}  \leadsto  False }%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddkw{exfalso} \, \ddnt{a}  \Leftarrow  \ddnt{B}}{%
{\dddrulename{c\_exfalso}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddrulecXXlet}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \Rightarrow  \ddnt{A}}%
\ddpremise{ \Gamma ,  \ddmv{x} \! :\! \ddnt{A}   \ddsym{,}  \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a}  \vdash  \ddnt{b}  \Leftarrow  \ddnt{B}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddkw{let} \, \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{=}  \ddnt{a} \, \ddkw{in} \, \ddnt{b}  \Leftarrow  \ddnt{B}}{%
{\dddrulename{c\_let}}{}%
}}


\newcommand{\dddrulecXXletpairXXLR}[1]{\dddrule[#1]{%
\ddpremise{\Gamma  \vdash  \ddmv{z}  \Rightarrow   ( \ddmv{x}  :  \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}} ) \times  \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{2}}}} _ \ddmv{x} }%
\ddpremise{  \Gamma ,  \ddmv{x} \! :\! \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{1}}}}  ,  \ddmv{y} \! :\! \ddnt{A_{{\mathrm{2}}}}   \ddsym{,}  \ddmv{z}  \ddsym{=}  \ddsym{(}  \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{,}  \ddmv{y}  \ddsym{)}  \vdash  \ddnt{b}  \Leftarrow  \ddnt{B}}%
}{
\Gamma  \vdash  \ddkw{let} \, \ddsym{(}  \ddmv{x}  \ddsym{,}  \ddmv{y}  \ddsym{)}  \ddsym{=}  \ddmv{z} \, \ddkw{in} \, \ddnt{b}  \Leftarrow  \ddnt{B}}{%
{\dddrulename{c\_letpair\_LR}}{}%
}}

\newcommand{\dddefncheckType}[1]{\begin{dddefnblock}[#1]{$\Gamma  \vdash  \ddnt{a}  \Leftarrow  \ddnt{B}$}{\ddcom{type checking}}
\ddusedrule{\dddrulecXXlambda{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddrulecXXinferXXsimple{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddrulecXXswitchXXmode{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddrulecXXWHNF{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddrulecXXpair{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddrulecXXletpairXXsimple{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddrulecXXletpairXXRL{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddrulecXXrefl{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddrulecXXsubstXXleftXXsimple{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddrulecXXsubstXXrightXXsimple{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddrulecXXsubstXXl{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddrulecXXsubstXXr{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddrulecXXexfalso{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddrulecXXlet{}}
\ddusedrule{\dddrulecXXletpairXXLR{}}
\end{dddefnblock}}


\newcommand{\dddefnsJBidirectional}{
\dddefncheckCtx{}\dddefninferType{}\dddefncheckType{}}

\newcommand{\dddefnss}{
\dddefnsJImpleq
\dddefnsJWHNF
\dddefnsJEq
\dddefnsJTyping
\dddefnsJBidirectional
}

\newcommand{\ddall}{\ddmetavars\\[0pt]
\ddgrammar\\[5.0mm]
\dddefnss}
